page: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Eadsv7 family. It is powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor containing 80 physical cores and 160 vCPUs via multithreading. The system features 1280.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It includes 9449 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier across multiple performance dimensions. The AMD EPYC processor delivers a multi-core stress-ng score of 287,659.31 and a PassMark CPU score of 144,267.77. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 14,497.71 GB/sec and a large block uncached write bandwidth of 210.18 GB/sec. Database operations are highly efficient, with Redis SET operations reaching 202.43 million operations per second and PassMark database operations scoring 41,416.44.

Given its high resource density, including massive memory capacity and substantial local storage, the E160ads_v7 offers high qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise workloads requiring large-scale data processing without the need for discrete GPU acceleration. The absence of a GPU makes it less suitable for heavy deep learning training, but it demonstrates strong CPU-based LLM inference capabilities, processing 72.09 tokens per second for a medium 7B model. This server is optimized for memory-intensive databases, large-scale Redis deployments, high-throughput web serving, and complex data decompression tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server instance from the Eadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 160 vCPUs across 80 physical cores, 1280.0 GB of RAM, and 9449 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 platform delivers top-tier performance across CPU, memory, and database benchmarks. It achieves a PassMark CPU score of 144,267.77 and processes 202.43 million Redis SET operations per second. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core and premium storage capabilities, the instance provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale data processing. It is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, enterprise-grade caching layers, high-throughput web serving, and CPU-based LLM inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 160 vCPUs, 1280 GB RAM, and 9449 GB local storage, delivering top-tier performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E160ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server with 160 vCPUs, 1280 GB RAM, and 9449 GB local storage for high-performance database workloads.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized platform featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and massive local storage for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 160 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD EPYC 9V45 processors
1280.0 GB of system memory for memory-intensive applications
9449 GB of high-capacity local storage with Premium Storage support
Top-tier database performance with 202.43 million Redis SET operations per second
Optimized for large-scale databases, caching layers, and high-throughput web serving
